title: elaphoglossum quisqueyanum
intro: Elaphoglossum quisqueyanum is a species of fern, specifically a type of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Elaphoglossum quisqueyanum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
